allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\npm.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3; where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\" -Directory | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm|fnm' } | Select-Object Name)
